_comment: How the search-engine module is merged into a theme. copyDirs: every file under theme-module/<dir> is written as asset <dir>/<file>. injections: blocks inserted into the theme's own shared files (replaced between CGP-SEARCH markers if present, else inserted after the anchor line).

block: {%- comment -%} ===== CGP-SEARCH START — search engine module; re-applied by the admin app. Keep the markers. ===== {%- endcomment -%}

_notes: main-search.liquid + main-collection-product-grid.liquid are wholesale theme sections we own — they ship in theme-module/sections and are overwritten by copyDirs. card-product.liquid (native-card discount/preorder badge) is OPTIONAL and not auto-applied. settings_schema.json is JSON-merged: our two named groups are replaced/appended, the theme's other settings untouched.
